## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Scope

- [ ] New section / component
- [ ] New project entry
- [ ] Content/data change
- [ ] Tooling / infrastructure

## Constraints (repo rules)

- [ ] No redesign of the existing visual identity
- [ ] Semantic color tokens; both themes
- [ ] `/docs` updated as the source of truth
